message:
feat: Mission Control Request Approval with deep link review (#9422)

* feat: add Request Approval button to Mission Control blueprint

Adds a 'Request Approval' action in the Flight Plan footer that creates
a GitHub issue on any repo the user specifies. The issue contains the
full deployment plan: mission description, project table, cluster
assignments, phased rollout schedule, and an approval checklist.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add reviewer notes, deep link viewer, and review mode

Adds notes-for-reviewers textarea to the approval modal, encodes the
full mission plan as a shareable URL, and implements a read-only review
mode that any console instance can open from the deep link.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: remove unused prev parameter in hydrateFromPlan

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

setRepo] = useState('') + const [notes, setNotes] = useState('') + const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false) + const [issueUrl, setIssueUrl] = useState(null) + + const isValidRepo = string }).message || `HTTP ${res.status}` + if (res.status === 404) { + showToast(`Repository "${trimmedRepo}" not found or you don't have write access`, 'error') + } else if (res.status === 422 && 'application/vnd.github+json', + 'Content-Type': 'application/json', + }, + body: JSON.stringify({ title, body }), + }) + if (!retryRes.ok) { + showToast(`Failed to create issue: ${msg}`, 'error') + return + } + const retryData = await retryRes.json() as { html_url: string } + setIssueUrl(retryData.html_url) + showToast('Approval request created (label skipped)', 'success') + return + } else { + showToast(`Failed to create issue: ${msg}`, 'error') + } + return + } + + const data = await res.json() as { html_url: string } + setIssueUrl(data.html_url) + showToast('Approval request created on GitHub', 'success') + } catch (err) { + showToast(`Network error: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'unknown'}`, 'error') + } finally { + setSubmitting(false) + } + }, [repo, isValidRepo, token, state, installedProjects, showToast]) + + const handleClose = useCallback(() => { + setRepo('') + setNotes('') + setIssueUrl(null) + setSubmitting(false) + onClose() + }, [onClose]) + + return ( + + + @@ -0,0 +1,95 @@
+import type { MissionControlState } from './types'
+import { generateDefaultPhases } from './BlueprintInfoPanels'
+import { shortenClusterName } from './BlueprintReport'
+
+export function buildApprovalIssueBody(
+  state: MissionControlState,
+  installedProjects: Set<string>,
+  notes?: string,
+  reviewUrl?: string,
+): string {
+  const effectivePhases = state.phases.length > 0
+    ? state.phases
+    : generateDefaultPhases(state.projects)
+
+  const projectRows = state.projects.map(p => {
+    const status = installedProjects.has(p.name) ? 'Installed' : 'Needs Deploy'
+    return `| ${p.displayName} | ${p.category} | ${p.priority} | ${status} | ${p.reason || '—'} |`
+  }).join('\n')
+
+  const clusterRows = state.assignments
+    .filter(a => (a.projectNames ?? []).length > 0)
+    .map(a => {
+      const projs = (a.projectNames ?? []).map(n =>
+        installedProjects.has(n) ? `${n} ✅` : n
+      ).join(', ')
+      return `| ${shortenClusterName(a.clusterName)} | ${(a.projectNames ?? []).length} | ${projs} |`
+    }).join('\n')
+
+  const phaseRows = effectivePhases.map(phase => {
+    const projs = phase.projectNames.map(n =>
+      installedProjects.has(n) ? `${n} ✅` : n
+    ).join(', ')
+    const est = phase.estimatedSeconds
+      ? `${Math.ceil(phase.estimatedSeconds / 60)} min`
+      : '—'
+    return `| ${phase.phase}. ${phase.name} | ${est} | ${projs} |`
+  }).join('\n')
+
+  const totalEstMin = effectivePhases.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.estimatedSeconds ?? 0), 0)
+  const totalEstStr = totalEstMin > 0 ? `${Math.ceil(totalEstMin / 60)} min estimated` : ''
+
+  const notesSection = notes
+    ? `\n---\n\n### Notes from Requester\n\n${notes}\n`
+    : ''
+
+  const reviewLinkSection = reviewUrl
+    ? `\n> 🔗 **[View this plan interactively in KubeStellar Console](${reviewUrl})**\n`
+    : ''
+
+  return `## Mission Control — Deployment Approval Request
+
+> **This deployment plan was generated by [KubeStellar Console](https://console.kubestellar.io) Mission Control and requires approval before proceeding.**
+${reviewLinkSection}
+### Mission
+
+${state.description || '_No description provided_'}
+${notesSection}
+---
+
+### Projects (${state.projects.length})
+
+| Project | Category | Priority | Status | Reason |
+|---------|----------|----------|--------|--------|
+${projectRows}
+
+---
+
+### Cluster Assignments (${state.assignments.filter(a => (a.projectNames ?? []).length > 0).length} clusters)
+
+| Cluster | Projects | Assignments |
+|---------|----------|-------------|
+${clusterRows}
+
+---
+
+### Phased Rollout Plan (${effectivePhases.length} phases${totalEstStr ? ` · ${totalEstStr}` : ''})
+
+| Phase | Estimate | Projects |
+|-------|----------|----------|
+${phaseRows}
+
+---
+
+### Approval Checklist
+
+- [ ] Reviewed project selections and priorities
+- [ ] Verified cluster assignments and readiness
+- [ ] Confirmed phased rollout order and dependencies
+- [ ] Approved for deployment
+
+---
+
+<sub>Generated by KubeStellar Console Mission Control · ${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}</sub>
+`
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+import type { MissionControlState, PayloadProject, ClusterAssignment, DeployPhase } from './types'
+
+interface ExportablePlan {
+  v: 1
+  title: string
+  description: string
+  notes?: string
+  projects: Pick<PayloadProject, 'name' | 'displayName' | 'category' | 'priority' | 'reason' | 'dependencies'>[]
+  assignments: Pick<ClusterAssignment, 'clusterName' | 'provider' | 'projectNames'>[]
+  phases: DeployPhase[]
+  deployMode: 'phased' | 'yolo'
+  createdAt: string
+}
+
+export function encodePlan(state: MissionControlState, notes?: string): string {
+  const plan: ExportablePlan = {
+    v: 1,
+    title: state.title,
+    description: state.description,
+    notes: notes || undefined,
+    projects: state.projects.map(p => ({
+      name: p.name,
+      displayName: p.displayName,
+      category: p.category,
+      priority: p.priority,
+      reason: p.reason,
+      dependencies: p.dependencies,
+    })),
+    assignments: state.assignments
+      .filter(a => (a.projectNames ?? []).length > 0)
+      .map(a => ({
+        clusterName: a.clusterName,
+        provider: a.provider,
+        projectNames: a.projectNames,
+      })),
+    phases: state.phases,
+    deployMode: state.deployMode,
+    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
+  }
+  return btoa(encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(plan)))
+}
+
+export function decodePlan(encoded: string): ExportablePlan | null {
+  try {
+    const json = decodeURIComponent(atob(encoded))
+    const plan = JSON.parse(json) as ExportablePlan
+    if (plan.v !== 1 || !plan.title || !Array.isArray(plan.projects)) return null
+    return plan
+  } catch {
+    return null
+  }
+}
+
+export function planToState(plan: ExportablePlan): Partial<MissionControlState> {
+  return {
+    title: plan.title,
+    description: plan.description,
+    projects: plan.projects.map(p => ({
+      ...p,
+      dependencies: p.dependencies || [],
+    })) as PayloadProject[],
+    assignments: plan.assignments.map(a => ({
+      ...a,
+      clusterContext: a.clusterName,
+      projectNames: a.projectNames || [],
+      warnings: [],
+      readiness: { cpuHeadroomPercent: 0, memHeadroomPercent: 0, storageHeadroomPercent: 0, overallScore: 0 },
+    })) as ClusterAssignment[],
+    phases: plan.phases,
+    deployMode: plan.deployMode,
+    phase: 'blueprint' as const,
+  }
+}
+
+export type { ExportablePlan }
